titleStmt.title: SII 20.225: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 225. (B.K. No. 11 of 1937-38.) BARḌŌL, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar in the temple called Kumbhāra-dēgula.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1226, Krōdhin, Jyēshṭha. The tithi and the weekday are not given. The year and the month correspond to A.D. 1304, May-June.

It records a grant of land made to Chalava of Kauśika-gōtra by Kaṁchagāra Rēvisetti and others, at the instance of Sarvādhikāri Viṭha adēva-nāyaka, an officer under Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jaitapāḷadēva-rāṇe.
The donee is stated to have been born in the royal family (rāja-vaṁśa).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī sakavariṣa 1226 krōdhi
saṁvatsara jēṣṭādiya prauḍha
pratāpacakravartti śrī rāma
caṁdra vijayarājyōdyē tatpāda
padmōpajīvi mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara
śrī jaitapāḷadēvorāṇi vija
yarājyōdayada sarvvādhikāri
viṭhaladēvanāyakara nirōpita paṭṭā
yila kaṁcakāṟa rēviseṭṭiyaru prabhu mā
nya samasta prajegaḷu śrīmatu rājavaṁśō
dbhava kauvuśikagōtra calavoṁge datta koḷa
ke 19 pa vritti kari koḷarelalli keI ma 12
ke 4 vanu 1 mane hasta 12 yaṣṭabhō
ga tēja samasta sāṁmya saṁdaḍi
daṁ mane 9 koḷake yōgya bhōga caṁ
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ maṁgaḷa
mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
